title: Run six-cycle creative optimizer retries for three Suco scores

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Selected three completed/non-improving Suco optimizer candidates and launched fresh six-cycle runs with 90-day feedback and max 200 samples: Appropriate Rebuttal- AI (procedure ae1e7047-93c4-4827-aec4-6ab3c5053eba, pid 41877), Early Transfer AI (procedure cecc98e9-d063-46ac-883e-4f58507f3ac1, pid 41878), Project Intent AI (procedure a102c313-21b3-41f6-92a1-e31c6d032a7d, pid 41879).
